# volcenginecc_vmp_alerting_rule (Data Source)

Data Source schema for Volcengine::VMP::AlertingRule



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `id` (String) Uniquely identifies the resource.

### Read-Only

- `alerting_rule_id` (String) Alert rule ID
- `annotations` (Attributes Set) Annotation attached to the alert (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--annotations))
- `create_time` (String) Alert rule creation time
- `description` (String) Alert rule description
- `labels` (Attributes Set) Tags attached to the alert (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--labels))
- `levels` (Attributes List) Alert severity (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--levels))
- `name` (String) Alert rule name
- `notify_group_policy_id` (String) Alert aggregation policy ID
- `notify_policy_id` (String) Alert notification policy ID
- `query` (Attributes) Alert configuration (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--query))
- `status` (String) Alert rule status: Running (monitoring), Disabled (disabled)
- `tags` (Attributes Set) Tag (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--tags))
- `type` (String) Alert rule type. Allowed values: vmp/PromQL
- `update_time` (String) Alert rule update time

<a id="nestedatt--annotations"></a>
### Nested Schema for `annotations`

Read-Only:

- `name` (String) Tag or annotation key
- `value` (String) Tag or annotation value. If set to empty, the key will be deleted


<a id="nestedatt--labels"></a>
### Nested Schema for `labels`

Read-Only:

- `name` (String) Tag or annotation key
- `value` (String) Tag or annotation value. If set to empty, the key will be deleted


<a id="nestedatt--levels"></a>
### Nested Schema for `levels`

Read-Only:

- `comparator` (String) Alert rule comparison condition. Options: >, >=, <, <=, ==, !=
- `for` (String) Alert duration. Possible values: 0s, 1m, 2m, 5m, 10m
- `level` (String) Alert rule severity. Currently supports P0, P1, or P2
- `threshold` (Number) Alert rule threshold


<a id="nestedatt--query"></a>
### Nested Schema for `query`

Read-Only:

- `prom_ql` (String) Query statement
- `workspace_id` (String) Workspace ID


<a id="nestedatt--tags"></a>
### Nested Schema for `tags`

Read-Only:

- `key` (String) Tag or annotation key
- `value` (String) Tag or annotation value. If set to empty, the key will be deleted
